Off Calendar May-28-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant, Rebecca Pierson for San Francisco Life Real Estate, represented by Daniel Bornstein for the moving party.
Respondents, Plaintiff Mark Grayson and Zachary En'wezoh, the opposing party.

This cause comes regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant, Defendant Rebecca Pierson testifies on her own behalf. The following evidence is submitted:
A: Binder with 30 tabs of documents. Tabs 1 through 22A
B: Binder with documents. Tabs 22B - 29

Respondent, Plaintiff Mark Grayson and Zachary En'wezoh testifies on their own behalf. The following evidence is submitted:
#1: Binder with 6 tabs and 20 pages of loose documents

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Exhibits are retained by the court. Exhibits will be returned after decision is rendered.
Judge: Braden C Woods; Clerk: Dennis D. Vegas; Not Reported. (D504)
